nodes.label: inteligentny-kalkulator-rozwiazywanie-zadan.jpg
nodes.description: Marketing/gallery photo for KalkMate website showing a user holding the KalkMate calculator (white desktop-style calculator with 'KalkMate' branding on its OLED display) on their lap while riding a tram. Next to the calculator is an open formula sheet (Polish matura 'Wzory' reference card) with physics/math formulas visible. Through the tram window one can see urban apartment buildings, tram tracks, overhead power lines, and a yellow STOP request button. Tram seats and another passenger's bag are visible. The photo conveys the product's use case: a portable AI-powered calculator helping a Polish student solve exam problems on the go, as an alternative to expensive tutoring.
nodes.summary: Lifestyle/marketing photo of KalkMate calculator in use on a tram with a Polish matura formula sheet.
